arts.ttl: Amorim makes ‘soft’ Man Utd admission following Everton draw
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim admitted his Manchester United side were too “soft” against Everton after they came from behind to draw 2-2 at Goodison Park on Saturday. The Toffees opened up the visitors in the first half, taking a two-goal lead through Beto and Abdoulaye Doucouré, and looked set for their fourth Premier League win in five […] The post Amorim makes ‘soft’ Man Utd admission following Everton draw first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Everton and Man Utd full-time reactions paint entire picture after Goodison Park controversy
arts.sum: EVERTON 2-2 MANCHESTER UNITED: Everton failed to kill of Manchester United as Manuel Ugarte's equaliser denied David Moyes a win against the club he once managed

arts.ttl: David Moyes is left FUMING after Everton's late penalty against Man United is overturned - as he insists VAR should NOT have got involved
arts.sum: David Moyes insisted that referee Andy Madley was wrong to overturn an injury-time penalty for Everton as Manchester United's last-ever visit to Goodison Park ended in controversy.

arts.ttl: David Moyes was 'more annoyed' with another referee decision after Everton penalty controversy
arts.sum: David Moyes was speaking after the Premier League match against Manchester United at Goodison Park

arts.ttl: Did Man Utd escape shirt-pull check in Everton penalty drama?
arts.sum: Manchester United breathed a sigh of relief when Everton's stoppage-time penalty was overturned - but did the officials miss Matthijs de Ligt's shirt pull on Ashley Young?

arts.ttl: 'I can't understand' - David Moyes left gobsmacked by decision in Manchester United vs Everton
arts.sum: Man United earned a 2-2 draw against Everton in the Premier League but almost conceded a penalty at the death.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits Manchester United were invisible in first half at Everton
arts.sum: But the Red Devils boss focused on the positives of their comeback 2-2 draw at Everton.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Manchester United as it happened - score, highlights, VAR explanation, Moyes response

arts.sum: Goals, highlights, result and David Moyes reaction following Everton's 2-2 Premier League draw with Manchester United

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim claims Man United looked 'soft' in 2-2 draw with Everton... as he insists stars 'are not doing what we need to do'
arts.sum: Despite the draw, Amorim was left unhappy with his side as they stretched their winless streak in the league to three.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer agrees VAR used 'wrong angle' as controversial decision saves Man Utd
arts.sum: Match of the Day pundit Alan Shearer took to social media to offer his opinion after a late penalty in Everton's draw with Manchester United was overturned following a VAR intervention
